calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Dec-09-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Hill appeared by zoom for and with John Perez in Court.

The Court noted that Driscoll Tubbs, or Clifford Tubbs did not appear to object. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
